name: Floret
description: A breathing, colour-cycling 3-fold radial fractal bloom on a near-black ground — a faithful Phosphene port of the Milkdrop preset `suksma - Rovastar - Sunflower Passion (Enlightment Mix)` (a z² conformal feedback fold + an energy-driven internal vortex swirl, bloomed by a 3-fold radial-pulse unsharp-high-pass kaleidoscope), on mv_warp with HDR float feedback. Audio-coupled to overall energy and the beat (not specific stems): the bloom inflates with energy, the field swirls and spins faster as the music fills out, it surges on the downbeat (cached beat-grid camera push), and the whole field punches with a radial shockwave on bass onsets. See docs/presets/FLORET_PLAN.md.
author: Matt

inspired_by.milkdrop_filename: suksma - Rovastar - Sunflower Passion (Enlightment Mix)_Phat_edit + flexi und martin shaders - circumflex in character classes in regular expression
inspired_by.source_form: butterchurn-presets built-in (pre-converted; no .milk file on disk, sha256 unavailable)
